text: What is Pixel Journey? A retro-pixel Web3 adventure that started on WAX in 2023. Collect Pixals, vote in Hot or Not, level up with XP, and explore verifiable on-chain mechanics across chains. Begin your journey today.
cta: Connect PxWallet & claim your first Pixal →

text: Pixal tiers matter. Holder → Stacker → Whale → Kraken. The more you hold & engage, the higher your tier and the better your rewards in Hot or Not and future drops. Which tier are you aiming for?
cta: Check your tier in the Px Content Studio →

text: Getting started with PxWallet is stupidly simple. Connect via WharfKit → create your first account → mint your first Pixal. All client-side, encrypted, and built for the long game. No seed phrase stress.
Hot or Not is live. Vote on the rarest surviving Pixals using verifiable TX-memo seeds. Earn XP, build streaks, climb the leaderboard. 50% of rewards go back to the community. Pure on-chain fun.
